root.title: Proactive AI Chat | Proactive Chat
root.description: Next-gen chat experience — proactive AI that remembers

Community.title: Community
Community.subtitle: Discuss ideas, share workflows, and help shape Proactive AI.
Community.noPosts: No posts yet. Be the first to start a thread.

sidebar.title: Your space
sidebar.signInHint: Sign in to post, comment, and get reply notifications.
sidebar.needsUsername: Set a public username in account settings.

Auth.title: Sign in
Auth.subtitle: Use your email to post and comment in the community. Sessions use secure cookies.
Auth.setUsernameHint: Choose a public username to continue.
Auth.signedUp: Account created. You can log in now.
Auth.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3–20 characters and cannot include / \ ? # or line breaks.

Market.title: Plugin marketplace
Market.subtitle: Search community listings, read reviews, and leave messages for authors. Package installation still happens in the desktop app.
Market.emptyAll: No listings yet. Add the first one.

detail.loginReview: Sign in to leave a review.
detail.discussionLead: Ask questions or leave a message for the developer. Threads are public.

newForm.title: Create plugin
newForm.lead: Create a public listing. You can edit fields later from the database or a future edit screen.
newForm.slugHint: A short, unique name for this listing in the database and for future URLs (e.g. my-note-plugin). Visitors mostly see the display name.
newForm.name: Display name
newForm.contact: How to reach you (Markdown: email, GitHub Issues, etc.)
newForm.required: Please fill slug, name, and summary.
newForm.slugInvalid: Slug must be 2–64 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only.
newForm.login: Sign in to list a plugin.

Download.title: Download desktop app
Download.subtitle: Choose direct download (exe) or open GitHub Releases for notes and verification info.
Download.note1:
Quick download for the Windows installer from our current release; we refresh this link when a new version ships.
Use it for a fast setup without opening another page.
Download.note2: For changelog, verification info, and other builds, use Releases.

Home.heroSubtitle: A next‑gen chat experience. AI proactively checks in, remembers your preferences, and reaches out at the right time.

Chat.quotaExhaustedNeedKey: Free quota is used up. Please enter your API Key.
Chat.localOnly: All info is stored locally in your browser
Chat.systemPromptPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default prompt…
Chat.systemPromptHint: Customize the AI behavior. Leave empty to use the default.
Chat.memoryEmpty: No memory yet. When you chat, key info will appear here.
Chat.emptySubtitle: AI will proactively check in and remember your preferences. Send a message to begin!
